author: Pokémon 公式
text:
UK: Amethio Cooks! 🍛 | Pokémon Horizons: Season 3 | Official Clip
We wish Ceruledge would help us slice vegetables for dinner... 🥕

Mighty G teaches Amethio how to make curry with help from their Pokémon.
